next_action: Use an explicit benchmark runner with sequential read-only codex exec workers, max concurrency 1, typed timeout classification, typed output capture buffer, bounded baseline scope, captured JSONL/final artifacts, and KrnBenchmarkReport output with lift unclaimed.
overclaim_boundary: codex exec is not continuous goal conversation; it is an explicit worker lane, and even a green benchmark runner does not prove lift below the gate.
rationale: Interactive goals and worker evals solve different problems. Goal 028 keeps live mode explicit while repairing the observed ENOBUFS and timeout-prone baseline scope so the live worker suite can be audited without pretending to be an autonomous conversational loop.
